title: BLOSTM Trowel Set 5 Piece - Brick Jointer, Pointing Tool, Gauging Trowel, Plastering Trowel - Made of Durable Carbon Steel - Builders Bricklaying Tools with Soft Grip Handles (5 PCS)
features: FIVE TOOLS IN ONE KIT - This 5-piece great value builders trowel set includes a brick jointer, pointing trowel, gauging trowel, brick trowel, and plastering trowel.

MADE WITH STRONG CARBON STEEL - Each masonry trowel is manufactured from high quality carbon steel to ensure a robust and reliable product. Each of our trowels are hardened and tempered with a lacquered finish for added strength and durability.

SOFT GRIP HANDLES FOR EXTRA COMFORT - The ergonomic handles have been specially designed for an easy and comfortable grip. These builders trowels can be used for a long period of time without causing hand fatigue.

MULTIPURPOSE - These versatile and precise tools can carry out a wide range of tasks, including spreading plaster, brick laying, mixing mortar, and smoothing cement or mortar joints between bricks. Ideal for both DIY enthusiasts and masonry professionals.
EASY TO CLEAN - Simply rinse clean after use, and then these bricklaying trowels can be used again and again. They are lightweight, portable and easy to store.
description: Product Description Everything You Need This trowel kit has all the tools you need to get the job done! Includes: brick jointer, pointing trowel, gauging trowel, brick trowel, and plastering trowel. Ergonomic Grip These tools were designed with comfort in mind. These builders trowels can be used for a long period of time without causing hand fatigue. Multipurpose There are multiple uses for this trowel set. Perfect for spreading plaster, brick laying, mixing mortar, and smoothing cement or mortar joints between bricks. BLOSTM Trowel Set 5 Piece This 5-piece trowel set includes a brick jointer, pointing trowel, gauging trowel, bricklaying trowel, and a plastering trowel. These bricklaying tools have been tempered with lacquer for added durability, and are made from high quality carbon steel. The handles have a soft grip for extra comfort when using for long hours of construction work. This trowel set can be used for bricklaying, smoothing mortar, spreading plaster, mixing mortar, and more!
